name: Inspired Interiors with Sarah Sherman Samuel
original_name: Inspired Interiors with Sarah Sherman Samuel
overview: Having recently moved from Los Angeles to her home state of Michigan, designer Sarah Sherman Samuel creates beautiful homes for clients across the country. Each episode features a new project as Sarah balances work and family while designing amazing homes and furniture.

trailers.title: Inspired Interiors with Sarah Sherman Samuel - Official Trailer | Magnolia Network
